mnemonics.title: CNN Architecture Order
mnemonics.content: CPFP: Convolution -> Pooling -> Fully Connected -> Prediction (classic CNN structure)

mnemonics.title: Padding Formula
mnemonics.content: P = (F-1)/2 for same padding, where F is filter size

acronyms.usage: Deep learning architecture for image processing
Layer connecting all neurons for classification
Reduces spatial dimensions to single values per channel
Network with skip connections for deep architectures

acronyms.expansion: ImageNet Large Scale Visual Recognition Challenge

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a flashlight (kernel) scanning across a dark room (image), detecting edges where light changes - each position produces a brightness value (feature map)
Think of zoomed-out map - max pooling keeps strongest landmark, average pooling gives general overview - both reduce detail for broader perspective
Layer by layer: edges -> textures -> object parts -> whole objects - like building from lines to shapes to faces
Highway with emergency lanes - gradient可以直接从deep layers跳到early layers without getting lost

analogies.analogy: Like a police sketch artist - each filter learns to detect specific features (eyes, nose, mouth) and combines them to recognize faces
Like peripheral vision - neurons deeper in network see larger portions of original image, like seeing the whole forest vs individual trees
Like a medical doctor who completed general training then specialized - base knowledge from ImageNet, specialized for specific tasks like disease detection
Like ensemble of doctors each learning to handle missing colleagues - network becomes robust by learning redundant representations
